entities.name: SMART FOOD INITIATIVE
entities.description: An initiative focused on finding foodsystem solutions that benefit consumers, the planet, and producers

entities.name: FOODSYSTEM SOLUTIONS
entities.description: Solutions designed to be nutritious, healthy, environmentally sustainable, and beneficial for producers

entities.name: CONSUMERS
entities.description: People who consume food and benefit from nutritious and healthy foodsystem solutions

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The quality of being nutritious and healthy for consumers

entities.name: PLANET
entities.description: The global environment that benefits from sustainable foodsystem solutions

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The state of being environmentally sustainable

entities.name: PRODUCERS
entities.description: Those who produce food, specifically including smallholder farmers

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Small-scale farmers who are a primary focus of the Smart Food initiative

entities.name: SMART FOOD TRIPLE BOTTOM LINE
entities.description: The combined goal of benefiting consumers, the planet, and producers

entities.name: DIVERSIFYING STAPLES
entities.description: The process of increasing the variety of staple crops consumed

entities.name: STAPLES
entities.description: Primary food crops that comprise a large portion of the diet in Africa and Asia

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where staple crop diversification is a focus

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent where staple crop diversification is a focus
